description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Project that runs on pull requests and pushes to the main branch. The workflow has three jobs: build, build_d2d, and build_android. The build job uses a matrix to build the project on windows, ubuntu, and macos in both Debug and Release configurations. The build_d2d job builds the project on ubuntu with Direct To Display. The build_android job builds the project for Android in Debug configuration.
